papers_mined.title: Cantu a tenore (Wikipedia)
papers_mined.note: 4-male-singer polyphony (bassu, contra, boche, mesu boche); bassu+contra use larynx-affecting overtone phonation; UNESCO ICH 2005.

papers_mined.title: Sardinia Cantu A Tenore Oberton Overtone
papers_mined.note: Quintina = 5th-voice acoustic phenomenon emerging from 4-voice polyphony via overtone amplification of formants.

papers_mined.title: Sardinian Throat Singing Atlas Obscura
papers_mined.note: Bassu/contra constricted overtone-rich phonation amplifies formants; mesu boghe expands ringing overtones.

papers_mined.title: Aterue Sardinian tenores group
papers_mined.note: Contemporary tenores group documenting traditional 4-voice + emergent-5th quintina phenomenon.

papers_mined.title: Singing Voice Synthesis Differentiable LPC Harmonic+Subtractive (2306.17252)
papers_mined.note: LLM-side: DDSP-based singing voice synthesis using additive harmonic oscillators + subtractive sawtooth + FIR shaping.

papers_mined.title: Harmonics Overtones Sculpting Sound
papers_mined.note: LLM-side: additive synthesis = sum of multiple sine waves at integer-ratio harmonics; classical synthesis paradigm.

papers_mined.title: Additive Synthesis Harmonic Series (teropa)
papers_mined.note: LLM-side: additive synthesis combining harmonics divided by count; saw-wave decomposition.

papers_mined.title: Harmonic Synthesis Chord-Aware Additive Synthesizer
papers_mined.note: LLM-side: chord-aware additive synthesizer combining selected harmonics.
